description: Style Note Dress your boy in this shirt from gini and jony and watch him play a game of soccer like a pro. The cut adds a hint of smartness to this shirt, while the fabric keeps him fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with shorts and sneakers for that uber cool and comfy look. Product Details Black short sleeve shirt with a highlighted collar with contrast tape at collar, full buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest with branding on it, appliqué and print on the right chest, print on the upper back, has a curved hem and buttons and stylish rivets detailing on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergent Do not tumble dry, bleach or soak Wash and dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron on print/embroidery
